lessons: Bow has 2 wins in last 10 rounds — switch to grapple or sword when shield (437+ sightings) or staff (260+ sightings) dominate.
Shredder (daggers) killed you in 3 of last 5 rounds (30, 31, 33) — daggers outperform bow in close quarters; avoid open areas and retreat if within 10m.
Staff users (Archmage, Reaper) killed you in rounds 26, 29, and 34 — never engage at range; close distance using cover or flanks to negate their AoE.
Shield users (Juggernaut) blocked all bow shots in rounds 32 and 35 — avoid chasing them; prioritize unshielded sword users, whom you’ve killed 8 times with 0 deaths in wins.
Grapple users (Scorpion) killed you in rounds 25 and 34 — avoid open areas; use walls and narrow corridors to limit their mobility and range.
Fast_zone modifier reduced survival time by 40% (round 28) — avoid prolonged engagements; prioritize quick kills or retreat immediately upon spawn.
insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Grapple outperforms bow against dominant shield and staff users, and has higher mobility to counter daggers and close-range threats.
